name: Youth Ministry
description: Helping young people grow in faith, purpose, and godly character.

name: Women Ministry
description: Encouraging women through prayer, fellowship, teaching, and service.

name: Men Ministry
description: Equipping men to lead faithfully in their homes, church, and community.

name: Children Ministry
description: Creating a safe, joyful place where children learn about Jesus.

name: Outreach Ministry
description: Serving the community, sharing the Gospel, and meeting practical needs with Christ's love.
